battery.desc: macOS battery charge gauge, self-sourced from pmset

diskwatch.desc: Live disk-usage table, self-sourced by polling df every 5s

du.desc: Largest immediate subdirectories bar chart, self-sourced from du

envbrowser.desc: Interactive fuzzy-search browser for environment variables.

free.desc: Used-vs-total memory gauge, self-sourced from free

gitauthors.desc: Git commit activity by author for the current repo — a live bar chart of commit counts per author (top 15).

gpu.desc: NVIDIA GPU utilization sparkline + gauge, self-sourced from nvidia-smi

jsonlog.desc: JSON-lines log viewer: a table of selected fields plus a per-level count bar chart.

listeners.desc: Live dashboard of listening TCP sockets, refreshed every 5s via lsof.

logwatch.desc: Live stream log-watcher — pipe a log into arb and highlight error/warn lines.

memtop.desc: Top processes by resident memory (RSS), refreshed every 2s.

netstates.desc: TCP connection-states histogram from netstat -an, polled every 3s

ollama.desc: Live view of the models loaded in the local Ollama LLM server (ollama ps)

ping.desc: Round-trip latency sparkline, self-sourced by pinging once a second

pinglat.desc: Live ping latency dashboard: a sparkline of round-trip times plus the latest value, self-sourced from ping.

procmon.desc: Top processes by CPU — a live, self-sourcing table sorted by CPU% descending.

streamstat.desc: Live stream statistics dashboard — line count, rate, and distinct-line count for any STDIN pipeline.

weather.desc: Current conditions from wttr.in, refreshed every 10 minutes
